creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 158433
Poudriere log for alpine-2.20_1

Bump. This port is BROKEN with the MAILDIR option right now.  I've confirmed the maintainer's patch fixes it.  See below for the original build failure.

Can a commmitter apply this?  This fixes a build issue as well so can this MFH to 2015Q3?

=> maildir.patch.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/alpine-2.20.
=> Attempting to fetch http://patches.freeiz.com/alpine/patches/alpine-2.20/maildir.patch.gz
fetch: http://patches.freeiz.com/alpine/patches/alpine-2.20/maildir.patch.gz: size mismatch: expected 33935, actual 38374
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/alpine-2.20/maildir.patch.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/alpine-2.20/maildir.patch.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/alpine-2.20 and try again.
*** Error code 1
